titleStmt.title: SII 10.766: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 766. (A.R. No. 582 of 1912.) ON THE EAST WALL LEFT OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE TEMPLE OF ŚIVA AT OLD LĒPĀKSHI, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT. Ś. 1600 (1602?). (Raudri)

summary.p: Records the gift of land to the temple of Śānta-Nañjuṇḍēśvara at Lēpākshi by the Reḍḍi and Karaṇam of the Old Lēpākshi-sthalam during the reign of Sultān Abdul Hasan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīśāṁtanaṁjuṁḍēśvarasvāmi . śrī vijayābhyudayaśālivāvanaśakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1600 Agunēṭi ravudrināmasaṁvatsaraṁ vayiśākha śudha 3 sōmavāraṁ
nāḍu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāyaku layina śrīśāṁtanaṁ
juṁḍēśvarasvāmi nityāabhiṣēkanayivēdyadīpārādhanaArcanāvrittivai
bhavādulaku yiccina bhūdānadharmaśāsanakrama meṭlaṁ
nnanu hajaratu sulutānu Abdulahasānu Alaṁ
paṁnnāhāgāru rājyaṁ yēlucuvuṁḍaṁ
ga hajarati yēlinavāriki sukṛtaṁgānu prātalēpākṣistaḷa
raḍḍikaraṇālu yiccina bhūdānadharmaśāsanapatrike stalanirdē
śaṁ maḍi caruvu kiṁda śrīśāṁtanaṁjuṁḍēśvarasvāmidēva
sthānaṁ kiṁdi kōnēraṁcumaḍilō 2 yiddumu dēvaḷānaku putta
raṁ nāgalakaṭṭakiṁda bhaṁḍaṁcumaḍilō 2 yiddumu vubhayaṁ ma
ḍi nalutumu tōṭalu dēvaḷānaku paḍamara vallaṁbhaṭlamaḍikiṁda
māmiḍipaṭlanēlalō �0 yirsamaḍi
ḍiki paḍamara ṭeṁkāyatōṭalō 1 tūmu
maḍistaḷāṁku vuttaraṁgā
teṁkāyatōṭlō yippimākula nēlalō tū
mu sthaḷālalō yiddumu
Note.—Raudri corresponds to Ś. 1602 expired and not to 1600.
Digital edition of SII 10.766 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
